name: Keebler 15-minute Lemon Chiffon Pie
recipeIngredient: KEEBLER Ready Crust Graham-Cracker Pie Crust (6 oz)
7 oz Carnation evaporated milk, well chilled
recipeInstructions:
Preparation Time: 15 minutes. Chilling Time: 1 hour.
1. Pour the chilled evaporated milk into a medium-sized bowl and whip with an electric mixer until soft peaks form, about 1-2 minutes.
2. Mix water, lemon juice, and gelatin in a microwave-safe bowl and heat on high for 1 minute. Stir to dissolve gelatin.
3. Mix whipped milk, sugar, food coloring (if using), and gelatin mixture with an electric mixer until thoroughly blended.
4. Pour the mixture into the pie crust. Cover with an inverted plastic dome.
5. Chill until fully set, at least 1 hour.
6. Garnish with kiwi fruit, if desired.
